briefdescription.para: Callback executed after the page has been popped.
Access the outer margins that keep the lower page visible.
Access the preferred line width for the description text.
Replace the preferred line width for the description text.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string id, std::string title, Keys keys={}, int priority=0)
memberdef.name: addChoice

parameterdescription.para: Display priority; larger values are shown first.

simplesect.para: The action backing the choice button.

briefdescription.para: Add one choice using the title as stable identifier.

parameterdescription.para: Display priority; larger values are shown first.

simplesect.para: The action backing the choice button.

briefdescription.para: Show this page on the application display and focus the first enabled choice.
Pop this page from the application display.
Test if this surface paints every cell in its rectangle.

simplesect.para: true if the surface is opaque.

briefdescription.para: Layout direct children within this surface.

parameterdescription.para: Layout access for measuring and placing child surfaces.

briefdescription.para: Paint this surface into the target buffer.

parameterdescription.para: The paint context for the current paint pass.

briefdescription.para: Create a choice page from UTF-8 text.
Select the choice with the given insertion index.
Focus the first enabled choice button.
Get the display order index for a new choice.
Update child layout state from the current title, description and spacing settings.
A non-opaque modal page that asks the user to choose one action.
